target_audience_hook: Indian developers are hungry for practical AI tutorials that show real results fast. The '30 minutes' promise + actual app building process + Claude AI (trending but less covered than ChatGPT) creates perfect curiosity. The Hindi-English mix and 'Indian developers' targeting makes it relatable and specific to our audience's needs.
